---
id: scan-datasource-schema
title: "Scan datasource schema"
description: "Trigger a schema scan for a datasource. Returns a task ID for tracking the scan progress."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Scan datasource schema"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/datasources/{id}/scan"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Trigger a schema scan for a datasource. Returns a task ID for tracking the scan progress.

  as={"h2"}
